title: goniopteris abrupta
intro: Goniopteris abrupta is a species of fern, specifically a type of tropical fern belonging to the family Blechnaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris abrupta include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing swelling and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate various health issues.
